resultList.dtldesc: Find your dream home in this beautiful 3 BHK flat for sale at Marg Pushpadruma, Kalavakkam, Chennai Situated on the 4th floor, this house is Vaastu compliant and has an east-facing door, welcoming positive energy and natural light into your home.Property SpecificationsNestled on the 13th floor, this 1095 sq ft flat is semi-furnished and has modern decor to accentuate the interiors. The living room is the main comfort space in the house, and the dining area is right next to it, making everyday living easy. It also has two bathroomsone is attached to the master bedroom and one common bathroomboth with western-style fittings and a geyser for your comfort.The modular kitchen is a cooks paradise, equipped with spacious cupboards, utility room, a granite platform, and a stainless steel sink. The three bedrooms come with enough space for comfortable living.Youll appreciate the opulence of having one balcony attached to the dining area, providing invigorating views and wide ventilation. The floors are done in a desirable manner, having vitrified tiles throughout the house, providing an element of class.FacilitiesOpen parking is available on the property, and a borewell provides water all day and all night. It has CCTV cameras and security personnel as security measures, and two lifts are available for convenience. The dwellers can take advantage of ample amenities in the society such as power backup, a swimming pool, clubhouse, gym, kids play area, walking track, and senior citizen park.LocalityMarg Pushpadruma is ideally located near many renowned schools within 3 km. Hospitals are also within 3 km, providing easy access to medical facilities. Banks and ATMs are nearby for extra convenience.The location is well connected by transport, and buses and autos can easily be accessed, so travel becomes convenient. The main gate on OMR and a bus stop towards Kelambakkam, just 50 meters from the main gate, offer excellent public transport connectivity.
